---
title: "CRC entropy figure"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output:
  bookdown::html_document2:
    code_folding: hide
    number_sections: no
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(patchwork)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(ggrastr)
  library(viridisLite)
  library(grid)
})

source("rules/src/ggtheme.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
)

log_con <- file(snakemake@log[[1]], open = "wt")
sink(log_con)
sink(log_con, type = "message")

out_dir <- snakemake@params$out_dir
if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE)

loc_pal <- c(NC = "#1b9e77", PT = "#d95f02", LN = "#7570b3",
             ML = "#e7298a", MP = "#66a61e", MO = "#e6ab02")
```

```{r load}
ent    <- readRDS("crc_entropy_summaries.rds")
embeds <- readRDS("crc_embeddings_debug.rds")
```

```{r panel-a}
set.seed(42)
samp <- ent$adjsampens %>%
  group_by(location) %>%
  group_modify(~ slice_sample(.x, n = min(800L, nrow(.x)))) %>%
  ungroup()

pa <- ggplot(samp, aes(x = avg_meth, y = sampen, color = location)) +
  geom_point_rast(size = 0.3, alpha = 0.4, raster.dpi = 300) +
  scale_color_manual(values = loc_pal) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
  labs(x = "avg. methylation", y = "adjS", color = "location") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8)
```

```{r panel-b}
box_df <- ent$adjsampens %>%
  group_by(annotation, location) %>%
  summarise(
    median_adjS = median(sampen, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )

pb <- ggplot(box_df, aes(x = annotation, y = median_adjS,
                          color = location, group = location)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = loc_pal) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "median adjS", color = "location") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r panel-c}
meth_df <- ent$adjsampens %>%
  group_by(annotation, location) %>%
  summarise(
    median_meth = median(avg_meth, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups     = "drop"
  )

pc <- ggplot(meth_df, aes(x = annotation, y = median_meth,
                           color = location, group = location)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = loc_pal) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "median avg. methylation", color = "location") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r panel-d}
umap_mat  <- embeds$win_embeds$adjS$umap
kept_cols <- embeds$win_embeds$adjS$kept_cols
col_df    <- embeds$col_data[kept_cols, ]

umap_df <- data.frame(
  UMAP1    = umap_mat[, 1],
  UMAP2    = umap_mat[, 2],
  location = col_df$location,
  patient  = col_df$patient
)

pd <- ggplot(umap_df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = location)) +
  geom_point_rast(size = 0.4, alpha = 0.6, raster.dpi = 300) +
  scale_color_manual(values = loc_pal) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 2, alpha = 1))) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2", color = "location",
       title = "adjS window embedding") +
  theme_ng(base_size = 8)
```

```{r heatmap}
heat_df <- ent$adjsampens %>%
  group_by(patient, location, annotation) %>%
  summarise(median_adjS = median(sampen, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(sample = paste0(patient, "_", location))

wide <- heat_df %>%
  select(sample, annotation, median_adjS, location) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = annotation, values_from = median_adjS)

mat <- wide %>% select(-sample, -location) %>% as.matrix()
rownames(mat) <- wide$sample

brk <- c(min(mat, na.rm = TRUE),
          mean(range(mat, na.rm = TRUE)),
          max(mat, na.rm = TRUE))

ht <- Heatmap(
  mat,
  name              = "median adjS",
  col               = colorRamp2(brk, c("navy", "white", "firebrick")),
  row_split         = wide$location,
  cluster_rows      = TRUE,
  cluster_columns   = FALSE,
  show_row_names    = TRUE,
  show_column_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp      = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  column_names_gp   = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  right_annotation  = rowAnnotation(
    location = wide$location,
    col      = list(location = loc_pal[as.character(sort(unique(wide$location)))]),
    annotation_legend_param = list(location = list(title = "location"))
  ),
  column_title = "median adjS per sample and annotation"
)
```

```{r combined, fig.width = ng_fig_size(3, 2)$w, fig.height = ng_fig_size(3, 2)$h}
pa <- pa + theme(aspect.ratio = 0.6)

fig_w <- ng_fig_size(3, 2)$w
fig_h <- ng_fig_size(3, 2)$h

gg_fig <- (pa | pb | pc) / pd +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1)) +
  plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A",
                  theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(size = 8, face = "bold")))

print(gg_fig)

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fig_crc_panels.pdf"),
  plot   = gg_fig,
  width  = fig_w,
  height = fig_h,
  units  = "in",
  device = cairo_pdf
)
```

```{r heatmap-save, fig.width = 14, fig.height = 8}
draw(ht)
pdf(file.path(out_dir, "fig_crc_heatmap.pdf"), width = 14, height = 8)
draw(ht)
invisible(dev.off())
```
